Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 754}I don't like having a rank system and following orders, so I didn't think I'd like this cult, either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 754}But when I joined, it wasn't like that at all. It's not a typical cult or some strict organization.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 754}It's just a guy sharing his beliefs, and people who decide to respect him out of their own accord.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 754}So this cult isn't as strict as I thought it would be. I like that kind of freedom.[n]{f 1 1}
